notes.content: The Psychological Science, B.A. major in the School of Social Ecology has been renamed Psychology, B.A. Please refer to the Psychology, B.A. major agreement for current articulation information. Students interested in the study of psychology should be aware that in addition to the Psychology, B.A. major offered by The School of Social Ecology, The School of Social Sciences offers majors in the field of Psychology, and the School of Biological Sciences offers a major in Neurobiology.
